title: Property Manifest
description: Wave 109 / Phase C: Declares the canonical surface forms a course-specific SLM adapter must teach. The synthesis-side PropertyCoverageValidator and the eval-side PerPropertyEvaluator both consume this manifest.

family.description: Course-family identifier matching `lib.ontology.property_manifest._family_slug(course_slug)` resolution (e.g. `rdf_shacl` for any `rdf-shacl-*` course slug). NOT a specific course slug — a single manifest applies to every course in the family.

learner_persona.description: Wave 132d: short noun-phrase describing the target learner (e.g. 'an RDF/SHACL learner', 'a chemistry undergraduate'). Threaded into Trainforge.synthesize_training._INSTRUCTION_PROMPT_FRAMES variant 1 as the persona prefix. Default 'a learner' when absent.

validation_kind.description: Optional discriminator for the validation layer this property manifest's family supports. When set to 'shacl', the violation_generator catalog applies. Future families (e.g. JSON Schema) will declare their own kind.
